title: rangium japonicum
intro: Rangium japonicum, also known as Japanese angelica or Dong quai, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The medicinal properties of Rangium japonicum include its ability to promote blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support the immune system. Rangium japonicum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
